name: Sandstorm Gold Ltd.
description: Sandstorm Gold is a gold royalty and streaming company with a portfolio of over 240 royalties and streams on mines operated by third parties across North and South America, Africa, Asia, and beyond. Rather than operating mines directly, the company provides upfront capital to mine operators in exchange for the right to purchase a percentage of production at fixed costs for the life of the mine. It is a royalty/streaming stage company with no direct mining operations.
